name: QUAINT OAK BANCORP, INC.
summary: Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc. is a Pennsylvania-based savings and loan holding company for Quaint Oak Bank, a chartered savings bank founded in 1926. The company offers commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, residential mortgage loans, multi-family loans, construction loans, home equity loans, mortgage banking, title abstract, insurance services, and international correspondent banking through offices in Southampton, Allentown, and Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate, including SBA loans, totaling $309.7 million at December 31, 2025.

products.name: Commercial Business Loans
products.description: Business lending totaling $96.3 million, representing 17.6% of total loan portfolio at December 31, 2025.

products.name: Residential Mortgage Loans
products.description: One-to-four family residential loans including owner-occupied and non-owner-occupied properties totaling $70.5 million.

products.name: Quaint Oak Mortgage
products.description: Provides conventional, FHA, VA, and USDA mortgage loans underwritten to GSE-guidelines for sale in the secondary market.

products.name: Oakmont Commercial
products.description: Specializes in commercial real estate loans for small businesses primarily on the East Coast, sold in the secondary market.

products.name: Quaint Oak Insurance
products.description: Offers comprehensive home, auto, life, and business insurance coverage.

products.name: Quaint Oak Abstract
products.description: Provides title insurance and title abstract services.

products.name: International Correspondent Banking
products.description: Facilitates U.S. dollar payments for one international banking entity; $4.4 million in deposits as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: Multi-Family Residential Loans
products.description: Loans for properties with five or more residential units, totaling $40.8 million at December 31, 2025.

products.name: Construction Loans
products.description: Construction financing totaling $23.5 million, or 4.3% of total loan portfolio at December 31, 2025.

products.name: Home Equity Loans
products.description: Home equity lending totaling $5.4 million, or 1.0% of total loan portfolio at December 31, 2025.

products.name: Deposit Products
products.description: Certificates of deposit, business checking, and money market accounts; approximately 42% of deposits from outside Pennsylvania.

partnerships.partner_name: Federal Home Loan Bank of Pittsburgh
partnerships.description: Quaint Oak Bank is a member of FHLB of Pittsburgh, one of 11 regional banks in the Federal Home Loan Bank System.
Correspondent banking relationship to facilitate cash transactions at Quaint Oak Bank's primarily cashless branch offices.
Partnership established in March 2022 to facilitate U.S. dollar payments through international correspondent banking operations.
